name: Braised Whole Fillet of Salmon (Julia Child)
recipeIngredient: 1 large carrot, cut into neat ¼-inch dice
1 onion, cut into neat ¼-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
2. Add the carrot and onion (or celery) to the pot and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Increase the heat to high and add the salmon fillet to the pot.
4. Cook for another 3-4 minutes on each side, or until the salmon is cooked through but still moist.
5. Reduce the heat to low and let the dish simmer gently for an additional 2-3 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
